description: A button component with multiple visual variants and sizes.

loading.description: Shows loading state and disables interaction

click.description: Fired when the button is clicked

handled: tabindex is managed — removed from tab order when disabled or loading
Enter and Space activate the button
Click events are suppressed while disabled or loading

required.when: size="icon" or the button has no visible text
required.requirement: Provide aria-label describing the action (e.g. aria-label="Close").
Place the button inside a <form> and set type="submit"; aihio-button does not set submit semantics automatically.

counterExamples.reason: variant="primary" is not valid. The primary style is variant="default".
Buttons must not be nested. Use sibling buttons or aihio-dropdown for grouped actions.
Icon-only button is missing an accessible name. Add aria-label="Close" (or similar).
